opinion_id.description: ID or list of IDs of opinions to search (up to 10).

recap_document_id.description: ID or list of IDs of RECAP documents to search (up to 10).

query.description: Literal phrase to search for (case-insensitive). Up to 20 matches are returned per document.

snippet_size.description: Characters of context to show on each side of a match (default 300).
